content.en:
Thousands of years have passed.

Ye Tian broke into forbidden places in the Holy Soul Realm, relying on the combat power of his four-step invincible domain ancestor, he gained great benefits in the forbidden places everywhere.

Moreover, he often uses the copy body to derive and derive an ancestral technique.

After all, his ancestral skill is the entry realm, and if he is promoted to the Xiaocheng realm, his strength will be terrifyingly improved.

Under normal circumstances, if you want to elevate your ancestral skills to the realm of Xiaocheng, you need a long period of penance.

But if it is improved by derivation, it is countless times faster.

Under the evolution again and again, Ye Tian's copy body holy soul also collapsed again and again, but fortunately, the final effect was really good.

The Golden Silk Ancestral Technique, the Void Slash Ancestral Technique, the Void Escape Ancestral Technique, and other Ancestral Skills have all been promoted to the Xiaocheng realm by Ye Tian, but if you want to be promoted to the Dacheng realm, even if you have derivative characteristics, it will take a long time.

And the Holy Soul Realm is not far from the day it will be closed, even if Ye Tian doesn't want to leave at that time, but once the Primordial Ancestral Realm is blocked, everyone will be forcibly kicked out, this is the rule of this world, and the Invincible Domain Ancestor can't violate the rules.

At this time, Ye Tian was sorting out the harvest.

He is not interested in sorting out ordinary treasures, he only sorts out more precious treasures.

Star Soul Sand, Saint Golden Sand, Space Saint Fu Crystal, these treasures are the treasures obtained at the beginning.

Later, in some forbidden places, he obtained a lot of good things.

For example, the Ancestral Blood Grass that can easily reach the limit of a person's holy body, the Supreme Treasure that can instantly increase one's comprehension by a thousand times, the Void Soul Stone, or the Holy Blood Marrow that reshapes the foundation.

Especially the Holy Blood Marrow, this thing was of little use to Ye Tian, but to his family, it was a supreme treasure.

After all, his family's foundation was not very good at the beginning due to the lack of resources and inheritance, although it was very genius for ordinary domain ancestors, compared to those true saints in the Dark Sacred Domain, his family's talent and strength were average.

But the Holy Blood Marrow can reshape the foundation, allowing people to ascend to the sky and become demonic geniuses in one step.

In the past, the Holy Blood Marrow was also out of stock on the exchange table of the Battle Gate Treasure Vault, and the Battle Gate did not have it at all.

Even many Peerless Domain Ancestors were looking for the Holy Blood Marrow, which showed the preciousness of the Holy Blood Marrow.

However, it could not be found.

This time, Ye Tian found the Holy Blood Marrow in a forbidden place, and it was ten pieces, in order to obtain these ten pieces of Holy Blood Marrow, he and a terrifying existence in that forbidden place, at least no weaker than the four-step Invincible Domain Ancestor, fought for a long time, and forcibly cast the Five Elements Seal to trap the other party with a copy of the body, and the body went to steal the Holy Blood Marrow, which robbed the Holy Blood Marrow.

Of course, he didn't kill the other party, and he couldn't.

In addition to these treasures, there are also many other treasures, and there are also many of them, once they are brought back to the human race, they can definitely increase the strength of the human race.

The only pity is that there are too few time endowments in the Holy Soul Realm, and he has not fused into the time ancestor endowment, which is also the only pity.

Tens of thousands of years have passed.

A repulsive force came.

Whoa!!!

A Powerful Domain Ancestor has been removed.

When Ye Tian came back to his senses and found that he had appeared outside the Primordial Ancestral Realm, then the Superior Domain Ancestors of the Battle Gate brought Ye Tian back to prevent the powerhouses of other forces from attacking Ye Tian.

"Let's go, go back to the Ancestral Realm!"

The Fire Emblem War Ancestor of the Battle Gate spoke.

-----------------

In the Battle Ancestor Realm, Ye Tian and a group of Supreme Domain Ancestors have returned.

This time, one-tenth of the Battle Gate's Supreme Domain Ancestors fell forever in the Holy Soul Realm, and in some Holy Lands, all of their Supreme Domain Ancestors fell, and the losses were even greater.

Of course, as long as one person returns, that force will not lose money.

this day.

The Fire Emblem War Ancestor gathered Ye Tian and the others, mainly to announce one thing, that is, he hoped that Ye Tian and the others would trade some of the treasure resources to the Battle Gate, because many resources in the Holy Soul Realm were resources that the War Gate lacked.

Of course, this is not a gratuitous transaction, and they can obtain more precious resources from the Battle Gate.

Ye Tian saw that some Star Soul Sand and a small number of Saint Sands were traded to Zhanmen, and he also traded many resources to Zhanmen one by one.

Subsequently, Ye Tian exchanged an incomparably precious treasure from the Battle Gate - the Star Sacred Tablet!

The only function of the Star Monument is to open a layer of Star Enchantment, and once it is opened, even the Superior Domain Ancestor will not be able to break through this enchantment defense in a short period of time.

Ye Tian was also worried about whether a superior domain ancestor would make a move on him or the Xuanxu Saint Realm, so he exchanged for the Star Saint Tablet.

In this way, once there is a high-level domain ancestor attacking, he can open the Star Sacred Tablet in time to resist the enemy's attack, but ask the non-superior domain ancestor of the battle gate to take action.

However, the Stellar Monument can only be opened three times, after which it will become a normal Monument.

But even so, the value of the Star Sacred Tablet was very high, and Ye Tian could only barely exchange it for this treasure.

Exchanging so many rare treasures for a Star Sacred Tablet, Ye Tian felt that it was very worthwhile.

Subsequently, Ye Tian left the Battle Ancestor Realm and returned to the Xuanxu Saint Realm.

Now Ye Tian, who is rich and wealthy, is very extravagant enough to use a Ten Thousand Sky Star Leaf, and soon arrived at the Daoshan Realm and returned to the Xuanxu Saint Realm.

Xuanxu Holy Realm.

Ye Tian sacrificed the Star Sacred Tablet, which was connected to the origin of the Xuanxu Holy Realm, so that he could ensure that the Star Sacred Tablet could be opened at any time.

"With the Star Sacred Monument, there is no need to worry about security, and it is time to impact the Invincible Domain Ancestor Realm next!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He had already reached the extreme of the Supreme Domain Ancestor, and even the Holy Soul had completed the second qualitative transformation, so there was no need to continue to accumulate in the Supreme Domain Ancestor realm.

After choosing a day, Ye Tian entered the Holy Monument World to impact the Invincible Domain Ancestor Realm.

The impact of the Supreme Domain Ancestor on the Invincible Domain Ancestor was very simple for Ye Tian, he had condensed the Holy Soul, and it was a Holy Soul of the second qualitative transformation, and it was very simple to impact the Invincible Domain Ancestor.

Rumble!!!!!

The shackles were broken, and the Supreme Domain began to transform towards the Invincible Domain.

Countless Chaotic Yuan Qi energies poured into Ye Tian's body, assisting Ye Tian to complete the transformation of the domain body.

At the same time, Ye Tian's Holy Soul also changed, becoming more and more powerful.

Moreover, a new holy endowment was born in the depths of Ye Tian's holy soul, which was his natal holy endowment, and it was also the most suitable holy endowment for Ye Tian.

After a long time, the breakthrough was completed.

And Ye Tian's first time was not to see how strong he was, but to see what the natal endowment was.
